title: Index Configuration
collectionDescription: Configure the index page for the collection "{{groupBy}}"
existingConfig: A configuration already exists with {{count}} field(s)

confirm.replaceDescription: A configuration already exists with {{fieldCount}} field(s). Auto-detection will replace these settings with new suggestions.
confirm.replaceDescriptionWithFilters: A configuration already exists with {{fieldCount}} field(s) and {{filterCount}} filter(s). Auto-detection will replace these settings with new suggestions.

toggle.label: Enable index page
toggle.description: Generates a page listing all entities in the collection

grid.label: Grid view
grid.description: Displays entities in a card grid

list.label: List view
list.description: Displays entities in a table list

filters.noFilters: No filters configured. Filters restrict which entities are displayed in the index.
filters.pathHint: Path to field in JSON data (e.g., general_info.rank.value)

fields.noFields: No fields configured. Fields define the columns displayed in the index.
fields.instructions: Click a field to edit it. Drag and drop to reorder.
fields.pathToValue: Path to value in data (e.g., general_info.rank.value)

fieldEditor.labelHint: Text displayed in the interface (if different from name)
fieldEditor.dataFieldHint: Choose a detected field. Advanced users can still edit the raw JSON path below.
fieldEditor.useAsTitleHint: This field becomes the main title in grid and list cards.
fieldEditor.sourceHint: Path to value in JSON data
fieldEditor.fallbackHint: Alternative path if primary source is empty
fieldEditor.searchableHint: Include this field in text search
fieldEditor.dynamicOptionsHint: Generate filter options automatically from data
fieldEditor.inlineBadgeHint: Display as colored badge next to title
fieldEditor.urlTemplateHint: Use {value} to insert the field value
fieldEditor.valueMappingHint: Transform raw values to displayed text
fieldEditor.badgeColorsHint: Define a CSS color for each value
